guidance_notes: Segmenty FY2025: iPhone $209.6B, Services $109.2B (+15%, marza brutto 75.3%), Wearables $35.7B, Mac $33.7B, iPad $28.0B.
notes: SEC XBRL CIK 0000320193 (10-K FY2025, konczy 27.09.2025). Rev $416.2B (+6.5% YoY), op income $133.1B (marza 32.0%), D&A $11.7B, capex $12.7B. FCF nie wyciagniety wprost (OCF w cash flow); z formuly EBIT(1-tax)+D&A-capex ~$111B. Net debt ~$16B (cash&equiv $45.6B Mar'26 + marketable securities vs dlug ~$85B; ~neutralny, immaterialny dla FV). Tax efektywny ~16%.
